diagrams.title: System Call Execution Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the sequence of how a user program makes a system call and receives response
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how system calls transition between user and kernel modes

diagrams.title: OS Services Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between OS components and user applications
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how services flow from hardware to user applications

diagrams.title: System Call Categories
diagrams.description: Shows the six main categories of system calls
diagrams.purpose: Memorizing different types of system calls and their purposes
